title: ciminalis alpina
intro: Ciminalis alpina, also known as mountain arnica or alpine clematis, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ciminalis alpina include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Ciminalis alpina include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote healing and soothe the skin.
